title: CESM2-LE event extraction
author: Darren Ficklin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The 'percentile_calculation_precip_runoff_no_snow_published.m' code calculates the historical percentiles for rainfall and runoff for each CESM2-LE ensemble member, as described in the manuscript. Using these calculate percentiles, the 'event_extraction_published.m' code extracts all events and antecedent conditions, as described in the manuscript. All figures and statistics were created using output from these codes.
steps_raw: The 'percentile_calculation_precip_runoff_no_snow_published.m' code calculates the historical percentiles for rainfall and runoff for each CESM2-LE ensemble member, as described in the manuscript. Using these calculate percentiles, the 'event_extraction_published.m' code extracts all events and antecedent conditions, as described in the manuscript. All figures and statistics were created using output from these codes.
